ham.subject: Your Account Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We hope you are enjoying the benefits of your subscription. This is a friendly reminder that your current subscription will expire on 15 May 2026.

To continue uninterrupted service, please review your renewal options at <URL> and confirm your payment details by 10 May 2026. If you wish to upgrade or downgrade, you can adjust your plan at the same link.

If you have any questions, our Billing team is available 24/7 at support@company.com.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #987654 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

This is an urgent notification from the IT Help Desk regarding ticket #987654. Our records show that your account has not been verified and requires immediate action to avoid suspension.

Please click <URL> to verify your credentials and confirm your identity. Failure to do so within 24 hours will result in temporary lockout of all services.

If you did not request this verification, please contact IT immediately at it-support@company.com.

Thank you,
IT Help Desk
